summary: Complete testing of 2 project management enhancements: 1) Task status redetermination on project due_date cascade - when project due_date changes, non-completed/non-on_hold tasks get status redetermined (overdue if past, pending if future). 2) Projects page default status filter set to 'Pending'. All backend tests passed (8/8). Frontend verification passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Task Status Redetermination): Backend logic in routes/projects.py lines 631-671 correctly handles status redetermination. Non-completed/non-on_hold tasks get status set to 'overdue' if new due_date < now_utc, else 'pending'. Completed/on_hold tasks only get due_date updated, status untouched.
Feature 2 (Default Status Filter): Frontend Projects.js line 48 correctly initializes statusFilter state to 'pending' via useState('pending').
Pending status badge has correct yellow styling (bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700) with Clock icon from lucide-react.
seed_data_creation: Test projects created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two project management enhancements fully tested and working: 1) Task status redetermination - when project due_date changes via PUT /api/projects/{id}, non-completed/non-on_hold tasks get status redetermined based on whether new due_date is past (overdue) or future (pending). Completed/on_hold tasks keep their status but get due_date updated. 2) Projects page default status filter is 'pending' (useState('pending') on line 48 of Projects.js). Status filter dropdown shows 'Pending' as default selected option.

feature_1_task_status_redetermination.description: When project due_date changes, non-completed/non-on_hold tasks get status redetermined: overdue if past, pending if future. Completed/on_hold tasks keep their status.

frontend_tests: Status filter dropdown defaults to 'pending' - PASSED
feature_2_default_status_filter.description: Projects page status filter defaults to 'Pending' instead of 'All'

regression_tests.description: Due date cascade and auto-computed project status still work correctly
